title.rendered: Introducing the Travel FX Buyback Guarantee

content.rendered:
You’ve booked the flights, packed the sunscreen, and stocked up on your travel money. But what happens when you come home with a wallet full of leftover currency?

For most holidaymakers, it means losing out — either by letting the notes gather dust in a drawer, or by selling them back at a less-than-great rate. Not ideal.

That’s where our brand-new Buyback Guarantee comes in.

What is the Buyback Guarantee?

The Travel FX Buyback Guarantee is a simple add-on you can choose when ordering your travel money. It lets you lock in the same rate you bought your currency at — so if you come home with leftovers, you can sell them back to us without losing out.

In other words, it’s your holiday money safety net.

How Does It Work?

It’s easy:

  1. Order your currency online with Travel FX – as usual.

  2. Add the Buyback Guarantee – a small, optional fee at checkout.

  3. Enjoy your trip – no need to stress about overspending or underspending.

  4. Return home and sell back any leftover notes – at the exact same rate you bought them.

No surprises, no scrambling to check exchange rates, just simple peace of mind.

Why Choose the Buyback Guarantee?

  • ✅ Protects your rate – no worrying about market fluctuations while you’re away.

  • ✅ Saves money – no need to accept lower rates when selling back currency.

  • ✅ Adds peace of mind – spend freely on your holiday knowing you’re covered.

It’s the smart, stress-free way to manage your travel money.

A Real-World Example

Imagine you’re heading to Spain and you buy €1,000 at a rate of 1.15. With the Buyback Guarantee, if you come back with €200 leftover, we’ll buy it back from you at that same 1.15 rate.

Without it? You’d be stuck with whatever the market rate is when you return — and that could mean getting significantly less back for your euros.

Who Is It For?

The Buyback Guarantee is perfect for:

  • Families who don’t know how much they’ll need.

  • Travellers heading somewhere new and unsure of costs.

  • Anyone who likes to plan ahead and avoid surprises.

Basically, if you hate the thought of losing money on leftover notes, it’s for you.

Ready to Travel Smarter?

Next time you order with Travel FX, look out for the Buyback Guarantee option at checkout. For just a small fee, it could save you big in the long run.

👉 Find out more about the Buyback Guarantee here

Travel money made simple. Just the way it should be.

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
